common.appTagline: Create aAgentBot agent for your business in minutes

landing.heroSub: Create an AI agent that works for you: writes emails, calls clients, takes bookings and brings new customers — 24/7 without days off
landing.feature1Desc: An intelligent agent that communicates with clients, answers questions and solves problems like a real employee
landing.feature2Desc: Automatic booking with smart available slots calculation and AI-powered confirmation
landing.feature3Desc: Work on website, Telegram and WhatsApp from one dashboard
landing.feature4Desc: Detailed statistics on conversations, conversions and performance
landing.feature5Desc: Ready-made settings for salons, clinics, restaurants and other niches
landing.feature6Desc: Insert one code — the widget works on any site in minutes
landing.step1: Sign up and get 7 days free
landing.step2: Configure your AI agent for your business with the visual builder
landing.step3: Insert the code on your site
landing.ctaSub: 7 days full access, no credit card needed
landing.pricingSubtitle: Choose the plan that fits your business
landing.faq1q: How quickly can I set up a bot?
landing.faq1a: You can create and launch your first AI bot in under 10 minutes. Our step-by-step builder guides you through the entire process, from choosing a template to going live.
landing.faq2a: No coding required! AgentBot provides a visual builder with drag-and-drop configuration. Simply insert a single line of code on your website to activate the widget.
landing.faq3q: Can I try before I buy?
landing.faq3a: Absolutely! Every new account gets a 7-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required to start.
landing.faq4a: Your bot works on your website, Telegram, and WhatsApp simultaneously — all managed from a single dashboard. More channels are coming soon.
landing.faq5q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
landing.faq5a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. There are no long-term contracts or hidden fees. Your data remains accessible even after cancellation.
landing.faq6a: The bot integrates with your calendar, suggests available time slots to customers, and automatically confirms appointments. You set the rules, and the AI handles the rest.
landing.footerDesc: Create intelligent AI agents for your business. Automate communication, boost sales, and delight customers.

help.title: Help
help.subtitle: Find answers, explore documentation, or contact us
help.contactDesc: Didn't find the answer? Write to us and we'll help within 24 hours.
help.messageSent: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
help.messageFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again.
help.step1Desc: Create an account and get 7 days of free access to all platform features.
help.step2Desc: Use the bot builder, choose a type, niche, and configure behavior with templates.
help.step3Desc: Choose colors, position, add greeting and FAQ — customize the look for your brand.
help.step4Desc: Copy the widget code and paste it on your site. The bot will start chatting with clients 24/7.
help.quickLinkBuilderDesc: Create a new AI agent with the step-by-step wizard
help.quickLinkAnalyticsDesc: View conversation, conversion and activity statistics
help.quickLinkSubscriptionDesc: Manage your plan, view payment history
help.docApiDesc: Detailed REST API documentation for integrating with your systems
help.docIntegrationDesc: Step-by-step instructions for CRM, ERP and other systems
help.docWidgetDesc: Embed a chat widget on any site in under a minute
help.docTelegramDesc: Connect a Telegram bot for customer communication
help.faqQ1: How quickly can I set up a bot?
help.faqA1: You can create and launch your first AI bot in under 10 minutes. Our step-by-step builder guides you through the entire process.
help.faqA2: No coding required! AgentBot provides a visual builder with ready-made templates for different niches. Just insert one line of code on your site to activate the widget.
help.faqQ3: Can I try before I buy?
help.faqA3: Of course! Every new account gets a 7-day free trial with full access to all features. No credit card required. After the trial, you can choose a suitable plan.
help.faqA4: Your bot works on the website, Telegram and WhatsApp simultaneously — all managed from a single dashboard. New channels coming soon: Instagram, VK and more.
help.faqA5: Yes, you can cancel at any time. No long-term contracts or hidden fees. Your data remains accessible even after cancellation.
help.faqA6: The bot integrates with your calendar, suggests available slots to customers and automatically confirms appointments. You set the rules — days, time, slot duration — and AI handles the rest.
help.faqQ7: How to embed the widget on a site?
help.faqA7: After creating a bot, go to "My Bots", click "Embed Code" and copy the generated script. Paste it before the closing </body> tag on all pages of your site.
help.faqA8: Yes, all data is transmitted over secure HTTPS and stored on protected servers. We comply with GDPR requirements and do not share data with third parties.
